problem_statement: Given an array ГўВҖВҳarr of integer numbers, ГўВҖВҳar[i]ГўВҖВҷ represents the number of pages in the ГўВҖВҳi-thГўВҖВҷ book. There are a ГўВҖВҳmГўВҖВҷ number of students, and the task is to allocate all the books to the students.Allocate books in such a way that:

examples.explanation:
The allocation of books will be 12, 34, 67 | 90. One student will get the first 3 books and the other will get the last one.



Example 2:
The allocation of books will be 25, 46 | 28 | 49 | 24.
